description: This game was played by two 8d amateurs.  After a good game, Lesio (black) has a narrow lead coming into yose.  However a good yose by Solaris (white) has made the game within half a point.  See if you can lead white to victory.  Japanese rules, komi = 6.5, ten captures each.
